---
title: "Math Formula Generator"
show-reading-time: false
image: math-formula-thumb.svg
---

```{=html}
<style>
#latex-input {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 80px;
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
  font-size: 1rem;
  padding: 12px;
  border: 2px solid var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  border-radius: 8px;
  resize: vertical;
  background-color: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #2c2c2c);
}

#formula-preview {
  min-height: 80px;
  padding: 20px;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 1rem 0;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  overflow-x: auto;
  color: #000;
}

.action-btn {
  padding: 10px 20px;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  color: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  margin: 4px;
}

.action-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.85;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.action-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

#status-msg {
  margin-left: 12px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #2E8B57;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.format-tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: 4px;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.format-tab {
  padding: 8px 16px;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-bottom: none;
  border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f5f5f5);
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #2c2c2c);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.format-tab.active {
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  border-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  font-weight: 700;
}

#format-output {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 60px;
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #fafafa);
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #2c2c2c);
  resize: vertical;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.examples-list {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding: 1rem;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f8f9fa);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #2c2c2c);
}

.examples-list code {
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.examples-list code:hover {
  background: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  color: #fff;
}

.draw-section {
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f9f9f9);
}
</style>

<p>Type a LaTeX formula below (or <a href="#draw-section">draw one</a>), see it rendered in real time, then copy it as an image or in different formats.</p>

<label for="latex-input"><strong>LaTeX Input:</strong></label>
<textarea id="latex-input" placeholder="e.g. \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}">E = mc^2</textarea>

<div id="formula-preview"></div>

<div>
  <button class="action-btn" onclick="copyAsImage(3)">📋 PNG (4K)</button>
  <button class="action-btn" onclick="copyAsImage(12)">📋 PNG (32K)</button>
  <button class="action-btn" onclick="copyAsSvg()">🖼️ Copy SVG</button>
  <button class="action-btn" onclick="copyText()">📄 Copy Format</button>
  <span id="status-msg"></span>
</div>

<div class="format-tabs">
  <div class="format-tab active" onclick="switchFormat('latex')">LaTeX</div>
  <div class="format-tab" onclick="switchFormat('mathml')">MathML (Office)</div>
  <div class="format-tab" onclick="switchFormat('python')">Python/SymPy</div>
  <div class="format-tab" onclick="switchFormat('unicode')">Unicode</div>
</div>
<textarea id="format-output" readonly></textarea>

<div class="examples-list">
<strong>Click to try:</strong>
<ul>
<li><code onclick="setFormula(this.textContent)">\frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}</code> — Quadratic formula</li>
<li><code onclick="setFormula(this.textContent)">\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}</code> — Gaussian integral</li>
<li><code onclick="setFormula(this.textContent)">\nabla \times \mathbf{E} = -\frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t}</code> — Maxwell's equation</li>
<li><code onclick="setFormula(this.textContent)">\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^2} = \frac{\pi^2}{6}</code> — Basel problem</li>
<li><code onclick="setFormula(this.textContent)">\sigma(z) = \frac{1}{1 + e^{-z}}</code> — Sigmoid function</li>
<li><code onclick="setFormula(this.textContent)">A = \begin{bmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{bmatrix}</code> — Matrix</li>
<li><code onclick="setFormula(this.textContent)">P(A|B) = \frac{P(B|A) \cdot P(A)}{P(B)}</code> — Bayes theorem</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="draw-section" id="draw-section">
<h3>Draw a Formula</h3>
<p>Use the handwriting recognition pad below to draw a math formula. It will be converted to LaTeX automatically.</p>
<iframe src="https://webdemo.myscript.com/views/math/index.html" 
  style="width:100%; height:400px; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px;"
  sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-forms"
  title="MyScript Math Handwriting Recognition">
</iframe>
<p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#666; margin-top:0.5rem;">
  Powered by <a href="https://www.myscript.com/" target="_blank">MyScript</a>. 
  Draw your formula, then copy the LaTeX output and paste it into the input box above.
</p>
</div>

<script>
// Load KaTeX
(function() {
  var link = document.createElement('link');
  link.rel = 'stylesheet';
  link.href = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css';
  document.head.appendChild(link);

  var script = document.createElement('script');
  script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.js';
  script.onload = function() { renderFormula(); updateFormat(); };
  document.head.appendChild(script);
})();

var input = document.getElementById('latex-input');
var preview = document.getElementById('formula-preview');
var formatOutput = document.getElementById('format-output');
var currentFormat = 'latex';

input.addEventListener('input', function() {
  renderFormula();
  updateFormat();
});

function renderFormula() {
  if (typeof katex === 'undefined') return;
  var latex = input.value.trim();
  if (!latex) {
    preview.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#aaa;">Preview will appear here</span>';
    return;
  }
  try {
    katex.render(latex, preview, { displayMode: true, throwOnError: false });
  } catch(e) {
    preview.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#cc0000;">Error: ' + e.message + '</span>';
  }
}

function setFormula(text) {
  input.value = text;
  renderFormula();
  updateFormat();
}

function switchFormat(fmt) {
  currentFormat = fmt;
  document.querySelectorAll('.format-tab').forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
  event.target.classList.add('active');
  updateFormat();
}

function updateFormat() {
  var latex = input.value.trim();
  if (!latex) { formatOutput.value = ''; return; }

  switch(currentFormat) {
    case 'latex':
      formatOutput.value = latex;
      break;
    case 'mathml':
      formatOutput.value = latexToMathML(latex);
      break;
    case 'python':
      formatOutput.value = latexToPython(latex);
      break;
    case 'unicode':
      formatOutput.value = latexToUnicode(latex);
      break;
  }
}

function latexToMathML(latex) {
  if (typeof katex === 'undefined') return 'Loading...';
  try {
    return katex.renderToString(latex, { displayMode: true, output: 'mathml', throwOnError: false });
  } catch(e) {
    return 'Error converting to MathML';
  }
}

function latexToPython(latex) {
  // Basic LaTeX to Python/SymPy conversion
  var py = latex;
  py = py.replace(/\\frac\{([^}]+)\}\{([^}]+)\}/g, '($1)/($2)');
  py = py.replace(/\\sqrt\{([^}]+)\}/g, 'sqrt($1)');
  py = py.replace(/\\pi/g, 'pi');
  py = py.replace(/\\infty/g, 'oo');
  py = py.replace(/\\cdot/g, '*');
  py = py.replace(/\\times/g, '*');
  py = py.replace(/\\div/g, '/');
  py = py.replace(/\\pm/g, '±');
  py = py.replace(/\\sum_\{([^}]+)\}\^\{([^}]+)\}/g, 'Sum(..., ($1, $2))');
  py = py.replace(/\\int_\{?([^}]*)\}?\^\{?([^}]*)\}?/g, 'integrate(..., ($1, $2))');
  py = py.replace(/\\partial/g, '∂');
  py = py.replace(/\\nabla/g, 'grad');
  py = py.replace(/\\mathbf\{([^}]+)\}/g, '$1');
  py = py.replace(/\\ln/g, 'log');
  py = py.replace(/\\log/g, 'log');
  py = py.replace(/\\exp/g, 'exp');
  py = py.replace(/\\sin/g, 'sin');
  py = py.replace(/\\cos/g, 'cos');
  py = py.replace(/\\tan/g, 'tan');
  py = py.replace(/\^(\{[^}]+\}|\w)/g, function(m, p) {
    return '**' + p.replace(/[{}]/g, '');
  });
  py = py.replace(/[{}\\]/g, '');
  return '# SymPy expression (approximate conversion)\n' + py;
}

function latexToUnicode(latex) {
  var u = latex;
  u = u.replace(/\\frac\{([^}]+)\}\{([^}]+)\}/g, '($1)/($2)');
  u = u.replace(/\\sqrt\{([^}]+)\}/g, '√($1)');
  u = u.replace(/\\pi/g, 'π');
  u = u.replace(/\\infty/g, '∞');
  u = u.replace(/\\pm/g, '±');
  u = u.replace(/\\cdot/g, '·');
  u = u.replace(/\\times/g, '×');
  u = u.replace(/\\div/g, '÷');
  u = u.replace(/\\leq/g, '≤');
  u = u.replace(/\\geq/g, '≥');
  u = u.replace(/\\neq/g, '≠');
  u = u.replace(/\\approx/g, '≈');
  u = u.replace(/\\alpha/g, 'α');
  u = u.replace(/\\beta/g, 'β');
  u = u.replace(/\\gamma/g, 'γ');
  u = u.replace(/\\delta/g, 'δ');
  u = u.replace(/\\epsilon/g, 'ε');
  u = u.replace(/\\theta/g, 'θ');
  u = u.replace(/\\lambda/g, 'λ');
  u = u.replace(/\\mu/g, 'μ');
  u = u.replace(/\\sigma/g, 'σ');
  u = u.replace(/\\phi/g, 'φ');
  u = u.replace(/\\omega/g, 'ω');
  u = u.replace(/\\nabla/g, '∇');
  u = u.replace(/\\partial/g, '∂');
  u = u.replace(/\\sum/g, '∑');
  u = u.replace(/\\prod/g, '∏');
  u = u.replace(/\\int/g, '∫');
  u = u.replace(/\\in/g, '∈');
  u = u.replace(/\\forall/g, '∀');
  u = u.replace(/\\exists/g, '∃');
  u = u.replace(/\\mathbf\{([^}]+)\}/g, '$1');
  u = u.replace(/_\{([^}]+)\}/g, '[$1]');
  u = u.replace(/\^\{([^}]+)\}/g, '^($1)');
  u = u.replace(/[{}\\]/g, '');
  u = u.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  return u;
}

function copyText() {
  var text = formatOutput.value;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function() {
    showStatus('✓ Copied!', '#2E8B57');
  }).catch(function() {
    formatOutput.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    showStatus('✓ Copied!', '#2E8B57');
  });
}

function copyAsSvg() {
  var latex = input.value.trim();
  if (!latex || typeof katex === 'undefined') {
    showStatus('✗ Nothing to copy', '#cc0000');
    return;
  }

  // Render as SVG using KaTeX HTML output, then wrap in SVG foreignObject
  var html = katex.renderToString(latex, { displayMode: true, throwOnError: false });

  // Create a standalone SVG with embedded KaTeX
  var svgContent = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="600" height="120">' +
    '<foreignObject width="100%" height="100%">' +
    '<div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" style="font-size:24px;text-align:center;padding:10px;">' +
    '<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css"/>' +
    html +
    '</div></foreignObject></svg>';

  navigator.clipboard.writeText(svgContent).then(function() {
    showStatus('✓ SVG copied to clipboard!', '#2E8B57');
  }).catch(function() {
    // Fallback: download as file
    var blob = new Blob([svgContent], { type: 'image/svg+xml' });
    var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url; a.download = 'formula.svg'; a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    showStatus('⬇ Downloaded as formula.svg', '#B8620B');
  });
}

function showStatus(text, color) {
  var msg = document.getElementById('status-msg');
  msg.textContent = text;
  msg.style.color = color;
  setTimeout(function() { msg.textContent = ''; }, 3000);
}

async function copyAsImage(scale) {
  var btn = document.querySelectorAll('.action-btn')[0];
  btn.disabled = true;

  try {
    if (typeof html2canvas === 'undefined') {
      var script = document.createElement('script');
      script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js';
      document.head.appendChild(script);
      await new Promise(function(resolve) { script.onload = resolve; });
    }

    // Temporarily shrink preview to content size for tight capture
    var origStyle = preview.style.cssText;
    preview.style.display = 'inline-block';
    preview.style.width = 'auto';
    preview.style.minHeight = 'auto';
    preview.style.padding = '12px 20px';

    // Capture at specified resolution
    var canvas = await html2canvas(preview, { backgroundColor: '#ffffff', scale: scale });

    // Restore original style
    preview.style.cssText = origStyle;

    // Crop whitespace: scan for non-white pixels
    var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    var imgData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    var data = imgData.data;
    var top = canvas.height, left = canvas.width, right = 0, bottom = 0;

    for (var y = 0; y < canvas.height; y++) {
      for (var x = 0; x < canvas.width; x++) {
        var i = (y * canvas.width + x) * 4;
        // Check if pixel is not white (allow near-white threshold)
        if (data[i] < 250 || data[i+1] < 250 || data[i+2] < 250) {
          if (y < top) top = y;
          if (y > bottom) bottom = y;
          if (x < left) left = x;
          if (x > right) right = x;
        }
      }
    }

    // Add small padding around the content
    var pad = 20;
    top = Math.max(0, top - pad);
    left = Math.max(0, left - pad);
    right = Math.min(canvas.width, right + pad);
    bottom = Math.min(canvas.height, bottom + pad);

    var croppedWidth = right - left;
    var croppedHeight = bottom - top;

    // Create cropped canvas
    var cropped = document.createElement('canvas');
    cropped.width = croppedWidth;
    cropped.height = croppedHeight;
    var cropCtx = cropped.getContext('2d');
    cropCtx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    cropCtx.fillRect(0, 0, croppedWidth, croppedHeight);
    cropCtx.drawImage(canvas, left, top, croppedWidth, croppedHeight, 0, 0, croppedWidth, croppedHeight);

    cropped.toBlob(async function(blob) {
      try {
        await navigator.clipboard.write([new ClipboardItem({ 'image/png': blob })]);
        showStatus('✓ Image copied to clipboard!', '#2E8B57');
      } catch(e) {
        var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        var a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url; a.download = 'formula.png'; a.click();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        showStatus('⬇ Downloaded as formula.png', '#B8620B');
      }
      btn.disabled = false;
    }, 'image/png');
  } catch(e) {
    showStatus('✗ Error: ' + e.message, '#cc0000');
    btn.disabled = false;
  }
}
</script>
```
